short_title: Social Security Domestic Employment Tax Act of 1993
official_title: To amend title II of the Social Security Act and the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to increase from $50 per quarter to $2,000 per year the threshold level at which cash remuneration payable to a domestic employee in any year becomes subject to social security employment taxes, to provide for annual adjustments in such threshold amount, and to annualize the payment of domestic service employment taxes.
